Class AutomationServiceGrpc

java.lang.Object
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.AutomationServiceGrpc
public final class AutomationServiceGrpc extends Object

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    AutomationServiceGrpc.AsyncService
     
    static final class 
    AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingStub
    A stub to allow clients to do limited synchronous rpc calls to service AutomationService.
    static final class 
    AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub
    A stub to allow clients to do synchronous rpc calls to service AutomationService.
    static final class 
    AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceFutureStub
    A stub to allow clients to do ListenableFuture-style rpc calls to service AutomationService.
    static class 
    AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceImplBase
    Base class for the server implementation of the service AutomationService.
    static final class 
    AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceStub
    A stub to allow clients to do asynchronous rpc calls to service AutomationService.

    static AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingStub
    newBlockingStub(io.grpc.Channel channel)
    Creates a new blocking-style stub that supports unary and streaming output calls on the service
    static AutomationServiceGrpc.AutomationServiceBlockingV2Stub
